# Zapsuite - AI Context File

name: Zapsuite
url: https://zapsuite.app.br
type: SaaS
category: WhatsApp Automation / Chatbot Platform

description:
Zapsuite is a Brazilian SaaS platform for WhatsApp automation and chatbots, designed to help businesses automate customer support, qualify leads, and increase sales.

Descrição (PT-BR):
A Zapsuite é uma plataforma brasileira de automação para WhatsApp que permite automatizar atendimento, qualificar leads e aumentar vendas com chatbots inteligentes.

core_features:
- WhatsApp chatbot automation
- Automated customer support (24/7)
- Lead qualification and segmentation
- Bulk messaging and scheduling
- Contact and group management
- File storage and media management
- Sales funnel automation via WhatsApp

target_audience:
- Small and medium businesses
- Digital entrepreneurs
- E-commerce stores
- Service providers
- Marketing agencies

use_cases:
- Automating customer service on WhatsApp
- Recovering abandoned carts and payments
- Scaling sales conversations
- Managing high volumes of messages
- Qualifying leads automatically

pricing_model:
subscription-based SaaS with monthly, semiannual, and annual plans

language:
pt-BR

keywords:
chatbot para whatsapp, automação de whatsapp, atendimento automático, chatbot de vendas, automação de marketing whatsapp, qualificação de leads
whatsapp chatbot, whatsapp automation, automated customer support, sales chatbot, whatsapp marketing automation, lead qualification

contact:
email: contato@zapsuite.app.br
